notes: One test function per acceptance criterion. AC-2 explicitly asserts the positive 180.0 boundary (both via pytest.approx and a sign check). AC-3 and AC-4 additionally guard against the naive (target - current) implementation by asserting the result is NOT the unwrapped value. AC-6 covers input normalization for angles outside [0, 360). All float comparisons use pytest.approx(abs=1e-4) or math.isclose(abs_tol=1e-4). No src/, examples/, or tests/ files were read.
